hook_en: Draw four color-coded village paths across a tile budget without letting any of them cross or run out of stones.
hook_ru: Прокладывай четыре цветные дорожки между деревнями, не пересекая чужие и не истратив запас камней.
mechanic: Top-down 8x8 grid path-routing puzzle with shared resource scarcity (30-stone budget for 4 colored pairs).

design.lose_condition: stones_left < 0 OR path crosses another color
design.win_condition: all 4 pairs connected within budget across 5 villages
